html:
Exclusive to:

The Collected Dust is a Food Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It can be crafted with 1 Salt Crystals, 2 Rocks and 1 Nitre. To craft it, a player must unlock the Blueprint from a red Fountain of Knowledge's Distilled Knowledge. Additionally, each Ancient Kiln found in the Ancient Archive will spawn with a single Collected Dust.

It is used to cook Amberosia and craft the Thulecite Bug Net.

Trivia

  • The Collected Dust was introduced in the Forgotten Knowledge update.

Exclusive to:
“Ah-CHOO!”
–Wilson
“Great. What am I supposed to do with this stuff?”
–Willow
“Is strong dust! Very strong!”
–Wolfgang
“Dust to... somewhat denser dust.”
–Wendy
“GROSS”
–WX-78
“Better here than on my bookshelves.”
–Wickerbottom
“Looks kind of like maple sugar. Don't think I wanna eat it, though.”
–Woodie
“It may have some alchemical uses.”
–Maxwell
“The dust hath been förged intö a sölid blöck.”
–Wigfrid
“It's a good thing neither of us are allergic.”
–Webber
“A most unusual ingredient.”
–Warly
“Dusty”
–Wormwood
“It's gotta be useful for something.”
–Winona
“Just a bit of faith, trust, and assorted dust.”
–Wortox
“Made dusty block, florpt.”
–Wurt
“It took a long time to collect all that dust.”
–Walter
“It's likely to crumble away at any moment.”
–Wanda
The Collected Dust is a Food Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It can be crafted with 1 Salt Crystals, 2 Rocks and 1 Nitre. To craft it, a player must unlock the Blueprint from a red Fountain of Knowledge's Distilled Knowledge. Additionally, each Ancient Kiln found in the Ancient Archive will spawn with a single Collected Dust.
It is used to cook Amberosia and craft the Thulecite Bug Net.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Bụi Thu Thập là một Vật Phẩm Thực Phẩm độc quyền của Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong Return of Them. Nó có thể được chế tạo bằng 1 Tinh thể muối, 2 Đá và 1 Nitre. Để chế tạo nó, người chơi phải mở khóa Bản thiết kế từ Kiến thức chắt lọc của Đài phun nước Tri thức màu đỏ. Ngoài ra, mỗi Lò nung Cổ được tìm thấy trong Kho lưu trữ Cổ sẽ sinh ra một Bụi Thu thập duy nhất.
